battle_traits.name: The Unquiet Dead
battle_traits.description: One of your Deathrattle Skeletons units is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, it can use the following ability.

sub_abilities.name: The Rising Dead
sub_abilities.description: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battle_traits.name: Aura of Antiquity
battle_traits.description: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target's melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
battle_traits.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with any friendly units to be the target.

regiment_abilities.name: Overwhelming Hordes
regiment_abilities.description: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly non-Hero units that target a unit that has fewer models than the attacking unit.

regiment_abilities.name: Deathmarch
regiment_abilities.description: For the rest of the turn, add 1" to the target's Move characteristic and add 3 to its control score.
regiment_abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-Hero unit that is not in combat to be the target.

enhancements.name: Shyishan Blade
enhancements.description: The Rend characteristic of your general's Baleful Tomb Blade is 2.

enhancements.name: Stolen Animus
enhancements.description: Each time your general scores a critical hit, Heal (2) your general after the Attack ability has been resolved.

enhancements.name: Propelled by Hate
enhancements.description: You can re-roll charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
enhancements.declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.

enhancements.name: Soul-Drain Pendant
enhancements.description: Roll a dice. On a 2+, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the turn.
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.

passive_abilities.name: King of Shambling Bones
passive_abilities.description: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by the target for the rest of the turn.
passive_abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Deathrattle unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.

passive_abilities.name: Guardians of the King
passive_abilities.description: While your general is within this unit's combat range, both this unit and your general have Ward (5+).

passive_abilities.name: Cursed to Rise Once More
passive_abilities.description: You can return 1 slain model to this unit.

passive_abilities.name: Skeleton Legion
passive_abilities.description: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
